title: Preload a belongs_to association at query time
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.list_posts_with_authors/0`. Query all posts and preload `:author` (a belongs_to). Since this is belongs_to (single row per post), a join-preload is fine — use `join: u in assoc(p, :author), preload: [author: u]`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Introduces the 'belongs_to CAN use join-preload' nuance, but the pattern itself is mechanical.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes/claude-code-elixir ecto-thinking: 'Join preloads suit Belongs-to, has-one (single query)'
